# Edamame Inc. — Official Kintone Partner in the Philippines

> Edamame Inc. is the official Kintone partner in the Philippines and the 2024 Cybozu Global Partner of the Year. We help Philippine businesses build custom CRM, inventory, HR, and workflow applications using Kintone's no-code platform. Based in Pasig City, Metro Manila, we provide support in English, Filipino, and Japanese.

## Company Information
- Company: Edamame Inc.
- Role: Official Kintone Partner in the Philippines
- Award: 2024 Kintone Global Partner of the Year (Cybozu)
- Location: 15F Jollibee Tower, Ortigas Center, Pasig City, Metro Manila 1605, Philippines
- Phone: +63 928 872 7958
- Email: kintone@edamame-jp.com
- Languages: English, Filipino, Japanese
- Website: https://edamame-jp.com/kintone-philippines/en/
- Booking: https://calendly.com/kintoneph/freekintoneappconsultation

## What We Do
Edamame Inc. implements Kintone, a no-code business application platform by Cybozu (Japan's leading workplace software company, trusted by 37,000+ companies globally). We help Philippine businesses replace spreadsheets, disconnected tools, and complex ERP systems with custom apps built in days — not months. No coding or developers required.

## Key Services
- Custom Kintone app development (CRM, inventory, HR, project management, any workflow)
- JavaScript customization for advanced needs
- AI-powered solutions using Kintone AI Lab
- System integration (API, webhooks, third-party tools)
- Data migration from Odoo, Salesforce, spreadsheets
- Training and ongoing support (local PH team)

## Industries Served
Manufacturing, logistics, real estate, healthcare, BPO, construction, education, retail, finance

## Enterprise Clients
ORIX Metro Leasing and Finance Corporation, Daikin Airconditioning Philippines, Aeon Fantasy Group Philippines, Guhring Philippines, Maximum Solutions Corporation

## Competitive Advantages
- Deploy in days, not months (vs Odoo's 3-12 month implementation)
- No developers needed (vs Odoo/Salesforce requiring Python/Apex developers)
- Predictable pricing with no hidden costs (vs Odoo's 2-5x budget overruns)
- Local Philippine support in 3 languages
- AI App Creator ships now (vs competitors announcing future AI features)
- Only Kintone partner with a dedicated Philippine office
